generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudData
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for speed data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for vehicle direction data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance SpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VedderESC
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance RawLidarData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, SQLDataStorage
]

instance SteeringAngleValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurement"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, SQLDataStorage
]

instance ClusteredPointData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered point cloud data from DBSCAN processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLidarData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series vehicle state data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDataStorage
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and software stack"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackDisplay, VehicleStateDisplay
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC computation to remote systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDesiredSpeed
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC functionality and emergency actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualization
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generating reports from vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReport
]

instance ObjectTrackDisplay : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of detected object tracks for driver decision making"
]

instance VehicleStateDisplay : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of vehicle speed, steering angle, and state"
]

instance ACCDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculated desired speed for adaptive cruise control based on lead vehicle distance"
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable adaptive cruise control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable adaptive cruise control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking action"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnvironmentVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the surrounding environment"
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive report of vehicle state data for analysis"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for controlling vehicle direction"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson NX, NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera, and Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLidar, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VedderESC, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, NVIDIAJetpack5SDK, ROS2Middleware, Python38, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink, SQLDataStorage, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ReportGenerationService, DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlModel, RawLidarData, DepthData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleValue, VehicleStateData, ClusteredPointData
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and steering angle adjustments from the Digital Twin Entity to the vehicle's motor and steering servo via ROS2, maintaining ≤100 ms end-to-end latency"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination between distributed components"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (visualization/control), and Cross-System Data Translation FE, interconnected via ROS2 within vehicle and Wi-Fi for cloud communication"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design phase (as designed) for ADAS development and operation phase (as operated) for real-time monitoring and optimization, per automotive DT applications in design validation and operational health monitoring"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for intra-vehicle communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication between vehicle and cloud-based DT Entity, with data serialization and translation via Data Translation FE"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle's NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity hosted in cloud; User Entity accessible via web-based interface; Data Storage in external SQL database"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework; ACC implementation based on ISO 15622 standard for performance class I"
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system requiring ≤100 ms end-to-end latency and 100 ms clock synchronization to ensure real-time control; no specific cybersecurity protocols detailed"
]
